AMD.news_query: "Advanced Micro Devices" OR "AMD MI300" OR "AMD ROCm" OR "AMD Ryzen"
AMD.context: Semiconductor company; AI/datacenter GPUs (MI300/MI325), CPUs (Ryzen, EPYC), competitive position vs Nvidia and Intel.

SNDK.context: Flash memory and storage; spun off from Western Digital in early 2025. NAND pricing cycle, enterprise SSD demand, hyperscaler capex.

FROG.context: DevOps software supply chain platform; Artifactory, Xray, security/SBOM, ML-Ops expansion. Enterprise sales motion.

APP.context: Mobile ad-tech and gaming; AXON 2.0 ML ad engine, take-rate vs Meta/Google, e-commerce ads expansion.

KVYO.context: Email/SMS marketing automation for e-commerce; Shopify channel dependence, AI features, enterprise upmarket motion, churn cohort behavior.

MDB.context: Document database with Atlas cloud growth, vector search expansion for RAG workloads, competitive against Snowflake / Postgres / DynamoDB. Watch Atlas net-new ARR mix and consumption-revenue trends.

NVDA.news_query: "NVIDIA" OR "NVDA" Blackwell OR Hopper OR datacenter GPU
NVDA.context: AI/datacenter GPU dominance via CUDA moat. Blackwell ramp, customer concentration (hyperscalers), gross-margin sustainability, networking attach (Mellanox), competition from AMD MI300 and ASIC alternatives.

META.news_query: "Meta Platforms" OR "Mark Zuckerberg" Reels OR Reality Labs OR Llama
META.context: Family of apps + AI infra + Reality Labs. Watch ad-impression / pricing growth, Reels monetization vs TikTok, Reality Labs operating losses, AI capex absorption, Llama open-source strategy.

MSFT.context: Cloud + AI + productivity. Azure growth vs AWS, Copilot monetization (Office, GitHub, Security), OpenAI relationship and capacity, gaming (Activision integration). Watch Azure AI services revenue mix and capex ramp.
